raw_output:
PR #136 review (Claude, Fable 5). CORRECTNESS: none blocking. LOW-1 tautological distinct-chips assertion (two different query strings can never return the same node). LOW-2 overcast 5,000 lux is at the high end of classic photometry tables (~1,000-2,000 plain overcast) though circadian-literature cloudy-day figures run 5,000-10,000; values match the issue verbatim and heavy-overcast 1,000 covers the low end — the issue asked for a literature check, satisfied by this review's own summary. Verified: presets write through the identical updateEntry path (no validation bypass; ADR 003 clear-to-null intact; silent overwrite is per spec); values match issue; .quick-add-btn shared class, palette vars only; a11y sound (typed buttons, self-describing text); tests mutation-verified (wrong-field mutant kills 8/10, wrong-value kills 2/10); full suite 277 green cold-cache; diff exactly two files. SECURITY: none — UI-only, static literals into JSX text, no dep/endpoint/sink.

--- Post-review delta ---
Branch updated onto dev after #133's merge (wave plan + Makefile changes; disjoint, clean merge). No code changes in the update.
